prompt: A small pine birdhouse shell sits clamped on a workbench: four walls glued together with the roof pieces resting loosely on top. Glue squeeze-out is visible along the seams, and blue painter's tape helps hold the joints. A bottle of wood glue and a small square for checking alignment sit nearby. The solarpunk workshop is warmly lit, tidy, and photorealistic at 512x512 with no logos or text.
